Andrea Goodman

Texas Country. Real Stories. Powerful Voice.
Listen & Watch Book Andrea
About

Kentucky roots. Texas stages.

Andrea Goodman is a Bluegrass girl who is now a proud Texas artist. She brings energy, powerful vocals, and relatable stories to every stage.

Her single, “Arkansas,” paints a picture of her journey and the experiences that have shaped her sound.

Texas-basedGranbury / Texas country market
Flexible setsAcoustic, duo, or full band
Booking readyVenues, festivals, private events
